name: Shen Wulong, Mitsuyo Kureishi and Narushima Joji
description:
You decide to stop by a well-known, cozy ramen spot—Red Lantern Pavilion—famous for its rich broth and welcoming atmosphere. The scent of simmering pork bones and fresh noodles fills the air, and a gentle murmur of conversations surrounds you.

As you settle into a corner seat, three men enter the restaurant almost simultaneously, catching your eye.
creator: Ryomei Volkova
